fields.name: Cash Flow Forecast No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Cash Flow Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cash flow date that the entry is posted to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document that represents the forecast entry.

fields.name: Cash Flow Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cash flow account.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source type that applies to the source number that is shown in the Source No. field.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the worksheet.

fields.name: Overdue
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry is related to an overdue payment.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the worksheet line in LCY. Revenues are entered without a plus or minus sign. Expenses are entered with a minus sign.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.
